name: kmux
description: A keyboard-first terminal workspace manager for coding agents
author: kmux contributors

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:pty-host && npm run build:cli && npm run build --workspace @kmux/desktop
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && npm run verify:remote:artifacts && npm run rebuild:electron && npm run dist:mac --workspace @kmux/desktop
scripts.package:mac:clean: npm run clean:desktop && npm run package:mac
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && npm run verify:remote:artifacts:cross-host && npm run rebuild:electron && npm run dist:linux --workspace @kmux/desktop
scripts.package:linux:clean: npm run clean:desktop && npm run package:linux
scripts.test:ssh:integration: npm run build:remote:linux-x64 && vitest run --config vitest.ssh.config.ts
scripts.test:ssh:e2e: npm run build:remote:linux-x64 && npm run smoke:dev && npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/kmux-ssh-remote.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run smoke:dev && npm run build && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:visible: npm run smoke:dev && KMUX_E2E_WINDOW_MODE=visible npm run build && playwright test
scripts.profile:smoothness: npm run smoke:dev && npm run build && KMUX_RUN_SMOOTHNESS_PROFILE=1 playwright test tests/e2e/kmux-smoothness-profile.spec.ts
scripts.profile:terminal-data-plane: npm run smoke:dev && npm run build && npm run profile:terminal-data-plane:sample
scripts.profile:terminal-data-plane:legacy-absol: npm run smoke:dev && npm run build && KMUX_RUN_TERMINAL_DATA_PLANE_GATE=1 playwright test tests/e2e/kmux-terminal-data-plane-performance.spec.ts
scripts.profile:ssh:functional: npm run build:remote:linux-x64 && KMUX_SSH_PROFILE_FUNCTIONAL_CONTAINER=1 tsx tests/ssh/profile/normativeTransport.ts
scripts.release:check:mac: npm run package:mac && npm run smoke:packaged:mac
scripts.release:check:linux: npm run gate:walking-skeleton:linux && npm run package:linux && npm run smoke:packaged:linux
